Pinyin: Nǐ měi tiān xǐ huān zuò shén me?
English: What do you like to do every day?

Pinyin: Wǒ xǐ huān yóu yǒng. Nǐ ne?
English: I like swimming. How about you?

Simplified: 我喜欢打篮球，每天都去打球。
Traditional: 我喜歡打籃球，每天都去打球。
Pinyin: Wǒ xǐ huān dǎ lán qiú, měi tiān dōu qù dǎ qiú.
English: I like playing basketball; I play every day.

Simplified: 我也是，我们明天去打球吧！
Traditional: 我也是，我們明天去打球吧！
Pinyin: Wǒ yě shì, wǒ men míng tiān qù dǎ qiú ba!
English: Me too, let’s go play basketball tomorrow!
